_meta.purpose: Per-image expected OCR fields for the Ship 1B OCR accuracy gate. scripts/washing-machine/ocr-accuracy-gate.py runs each image through minimax-vlm.sh and computes field-match accuracy (case-insensitive substring match on the OCR content). Corpus accuracy = mean of per-image accuracies. Exits 0 if corpus accuracy >= threshold.
_meta.notes: The 5 images exercise: (1) the Dr. Lo card (Chinese + English), (2) an English-only card, (3) an English+Chinese mixed card with a female Chinese name, (4) a doctor card with traditional-Chinese honorific, (5) a minimal name+phone card. Threshold 0.80 is the Ship 1B binary gate.
